name: @scenicai/monorepo
description: Interact with Unity via TypeScript and the command line!

scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: npm run test:sdk && npm run test:cli
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && npm run test:integration:safe && npm run test:integration:reload
scripts.test:integration:safe: npm run test:integration:sdk:safe && npm run test:integration:cli:safe
scripts.test:integration:reload: npm run test:integration:sdk:reload && npm run test:integration:cli:reload
scripts.test:integration:sdk: npm run build:sdk && npm run test:integration:sdk:safe && npm run test:integration:sdk:reload
scripts.test:integration:cli: npm run build:cli && npm run test:integration:cli:safe && npm run test:integration:cli:reload
scripts.test:local: npm run build && npm run test
